compiled_state.title: As a developer, implementation-plan executes review-protocol-workflow inline and sprint invokes implementation-plan via Skill tool
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update implementation-plan to read and execute REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md inline (instead of invoking /dso:review-protocol via Skill tool) for its Steps 2 and 4. Update sprint to invoke implementation-plan via Skill tool (instead of Task tool sub-agent dispatch).
**Why**: Sprint currently dispatches implementation-plan as a Task tool sub-agent, which prevents implementation-plan from executing review-protocol (sub-agents can't nest). By having sprint invoke implementation-plan via Skill tool and implementation-plan execute the review workflow inline, the chain becomes sprint (Skill) → implementation-plan (inline reads workflow doc) — no nesting bug, and plans get properly reviewed.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update implementation-plan Steps 2 and 4 to read REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md inline; update sprint to invoke implementation-plan via Skill tool; remove/update impl-plan-dispatch.md prompt template; update sprint's implementation planning gate to use Skill tool invocation pattern
- OUT: Review-protocol extraction (Story 4), sub-agent guard blocks (Stories 1-2), documentation (Story 3)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, implementation-plan reads and executes REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md inline for plan review instead of invoking /dso:review-protocol via Skill tool
  <- Satisfies: "Implementation-plan reads and executes REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md inline"
- When this story is complete, sprint invokes implementation-plan via Skill tool instead of Task tool sub-agent dispatch
  <- Satisfies: "Sprint invokes implementation-plan via Skill tool (not Task tool)"
- When this story is complete, implementation plans produced during sprint execution are reviewed via the review protocol workflow (verified by running sprint on a test story and confirming review scores appear)
  <- Satisfies: "Implementation plans produced by sprint are reviewed via the review protocol workflow"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Sprint currently dispatches up to 3 concurrent impl-plan sub-agents per layer — switching to Skill tool means sequential execution (one story at a time). This is a tradeoff: plans are properly reviewed but sprint takes longer for multi-story epics.
- [Testing] Verify the full chain: sprint → implementation-plan (Skill) → review-protocol-workflow (inline) produces reviewed plans
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: implementation-plan executes review-protocol-workflow inline; sprint invokes implementation-plan via Skill tool.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
